summary: Testing X_LINEA_NEGOCIO feature, product_template columns, and purchase_ok filter removal. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend shows correct macro config and 10 job rows. X_LINEA_NEGOCIO sync job exists and is correctly configured, but actual sync fails due to Odoo permission error (external config issue). PRODUCTS job shows old ERROR before migration - need to re-run sync after migration applied.

minor.issue: Odoo permission error: User 111 has no access to x_linea_negocio model. This is an Odoo-side configuration issue, not a code bug.

passed_tests: GET /api/schema/tables: x_linea_negocio table exists with 8 columns
GET /api/schema/tables: product_template has 20 columns (includes linea_negocio_id and linea_negocio)
X_LINEA_NEGOCIO job has correct config (enabled=true, schedule=DAILY, chunk=500, scope=GLOBAL)
All 10 expected jobs present (RES_COMPANY, STOCK_LOCATIONS, STOCK_QUANTS, RES_USERS, RES_PARTNER, X_LINEA_NEGOCIO, PRODUCTS, ATTRIBUTES, POS_ORDERS, AR_CREDIT_INVOICES)
Code review: purchase_ok filter removed from _sync_products base domain (only sale_ok=True remains)
Code review: x_linea_negocio_id field is fetched from Odoo
Code review: linea_negocio_id (INT) and linea_negocio (TEXT) columns in SQL insert
Migration: ALTER TABLE for linea_negocio_id column exists
Frontend: Productos macro shows 'Jobs: X_LINEA_NEGOCIO, PRODUCTS, ATTRIBUTES'
Frontend: Job monitor table shows 10 job rows
Frontend: X_LINEA_NEGOCIO row visible with Run button
action_items: ODOO CONFIG: Grant read permission for x_linea_negocio model to User 111 (Ambission admin) in Odoo
After Odoo permission fixed: Run X_LINEA_NEGOCIO sync to populate master table
After columns added: Re-run PRODUCTS sync to clear ERROR status (old error from before migration)
critical_code_review_comments: purchase_ok filter correctly removed - base domain now only has sale_ok=True
_sync_x_linea_negocio correctly implemented with proper fields and SQL
linea_negocio_id (INT) and linea_negocio (TEXT) columns correctly added to _sync_products vals tuple
Migration DDL correctly creates x_linea_negocio table and adds columns to product_template
X_LINEA_NEGOCIO job seed correctly added with priority=35 (runs before PRODUCTS at priority=40)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Sync Control page shows correct macro and 10 job rows)

context_for_next_testing_agent: X_LINEA_NEGOCIO feature fully implemented and tested. Schema and job setup correct. Odoo permission issue preventing actual sync (external Odoo config needed). PRODUCTS job ERROR is stale from before migration - need re-sync. purchase_ok filter confirmed removed from sync_engine.py.

odoo_external_issues.x_linea_negocio_permission: User 111 (Ambission admin) lacks read access to x_linea_negocio model in Odoo. This must be configured in Odoo admin panel.
